steps.name: backend-spatial-migration
steps.summary: V12 Flyway(POINT STORED + SPATIAL INDEX), GeoUtils.boundingBox, HelpRequestRepository.findNearbyOpen, Testcontainers 통합 테스트 추가

steps.name: backend-spatial-service
steps.summary: RequestService.findNearbyOpenRequests 추가(GeoUtils.boundingBox MBR + km→m 변환), MatchDispatcher 반경 @Value 외부화(localnow.match.search-radius-km), application.yml 설정 추가, RequestServiceTest 단위 테스트 4개 추가

steps.name: mobile-map-migration
steps.summary: react-native-maps → @rnmapbox/maps@10.3.0 교체, dark-v11 스타일 + UserLocation + PointAnnotation, .env.local.example 토큰 플레이스홀더 추가, Jest moduleNameMapper 등록
